signature_writing_techniques.name: Staccato fragment chaining
quotes:
A POD.
White light. Chrome ribs. A bed of wire and breath.
Small. Two rooms. Bare walls. A window that faces east.

Below the city.
Below the pipes. Below the line where anyone would think to look.
signature_writing_techniques.why_this_author: This writer builds visual rhythm through stacked nominal fragments that feel diagnostic, tactile, and emotionally compressed rather than merely minimalist.
signature_writing_techniques.frequency: Dominant across nearly every scene opening and many interior beats, roughly 70-80% of action description.

signature_writing_techniques.name: Negation correction beats
quotes: Not walls. Not floor. A LATTICE of someone else's mind.
Not asleep. Paused.
Not explosion. Cessation. A heart stopping mid-beat.
signature_writing_techniques.why_this_author: The writer repeatedly sharpens perception by denying the obvious label first, then landing on the more exact one, giving the prose an analytical and haunted precision.
signature_writing_techniques.frequency: Very frequent across all chapters, especially at reveals, emotional pivots, and threat descriptions.

signature_writing_techniques.name: Mechanical flesh fusion
quotes: A bed of wire and breath.
Lines of code that read as nerve.
Silver veins branching under the skin of his forearm.
signature_writing_techniques.why_this_author: Technology is never abstract here; it is always written as intimate with the body, making machinery feel organic and grief feel systematized.
signature_writing_techniques.frequency: Recurring throughout pod, port, tether, chrome, and Mirror imagery.

signature_writing_techniques.name: Object emotion tethering
quotes:
She reaches for the cord at her chest. The lens.
Still there. Still cracked. Still warm from her body.

The recorder against his ribs. The lens against her sternum.
Two totems. Two people. One choice made in the dark.
Kitchen counter. Two mugs. One clean. One used.
signature_writing_techniques.why_this_author: Small carried objects do the emotional labor that interior monologue would do in another script, turning props into grief anchors and moral markers.
signature_writing_techniques.frequency: Frequent and structurally important, especially with lens, recorder, port scar, camera, and domestic objects.

signature_writing_techniques.name: Readout emotionalization
quotes: TETHER SYNC ERROR / NODE KAI-9 / PARTNER NODE: DECEASED.

Her HUD: NEURAL PORT INTEGRITY: 3.6%.
Dropping.
COMPLIANCE OVERDUE: 240 DAYS / FINAL NOTICE.
signature_writing_techniques.why_this_author: System text is not decorative worldbuilding; it functions as emotional pressure, bureaucratic violence, and bodily diagnosis all at once.
signature_writing_techniques.frequency: Frequent whenever stakes escalate through tech, surveillance, or bodily cost.

signature_writing_techniques.name: Perception first reveals
quotes: The room is wrong. The light is the same. The furniture is the same. The air is not.

The reflection moves before he does.
Subtle. Wrong.
The same presence as the apartment. Not a body.
signature_writing_techniques.why_this_author: Scenes often begin with sensory discrepancy before explanation, letting unease arrive ahead of plot information.
signature_writing_techniques.frequency: Frequent in uncanny, threat, and Mirror-adjacent sequences.

signature_writing_techniques.name: Repetition with variation
quotes: Same room. Same setup.
Concrete ceiling. Same ceiling. Different skull.

Through the crack: the woman in the garden.
Through the crack: the empty kiosk with real flowers in its dead port.
signature_writing_techniques.why_this_author: The writer uses repeated stems with one altered unit to mark dislocation, memory residue, or moral contrast without expanding into explanation.
signature_writing_techniques.frequency: Frequent across scene resets, emotional emphasis, and thematic summation.

signature_writing_techniques.name: Exteriorized interiority
quotes: Her body changes. Subtle. Exact.
Nora heard it. Filed it. Data. Not feeling.
The cost is in her body.
signature_writing_techniques.why_this_author: Even when close to a character's inner state, the script routes feeling through posture, lag, cataloging, and bodily consequence rather than abstract introspection.
signature_writing_techniques.frequency: Very frequent in Nora-centered material and common in Jace and Riven scenes.

signature_writing_techniques.name: Soft coercive dialogue
quotes: We can give him back to you.
Let me finish what he started. No pain. No cost.
That was not corruption. That was love refusing to stop.
signature_writing_techniques.why_this_author: Antagonistic pressure is voiced in calm, intimate, almost tender language, which makes manipulation more unsettling than overt villain rhetoric would.
signature_writing_techniques.frequency: Recurring in Mirror and Ilya dialogue whenever ideology or temptation enters the scene.

signature_writing_techniques.name: Verdict line isolation
quotes: Living grief. Cycling. Feeding the system that promised to hold it.

The recorder is no longer a comfort object.
It is a tactical asset.
His grief is his.
signature_writing_techniques.why_this_author: The writer isolates conceptual judgments into short standalone lines that land like moral or emotional verdicts after concrete buildup.
signature_writing_techniques.frequency: Frequent at scene ends, reversals, and thematic pivots.

sentence_level_patterns.average_sentence_length: Very short overall; most action units run 2-8 words, with occasional 10-20 word explanatory lines for technical or emotional clarification.
sentence_level_patterns.cadence_variation: Primary cadence is paratactic and staccato: single-line fragments, then compact 2-4 line clusters, then a hard isolated beat. Longer lines appear sparingly to carry technical procedure or a compressed emotional thesis.
sentence_level_patterns.clause_structure_preference: Prefers fragments, verbless noun phrases, corrective negation structures, and short declaratives over subordinated syntax. When clauses lengthen, they usually remain linear and concrete rather than nested.
sentence_level_patterns.punctuation_habits: Heavy use of periods to separate fragments. Colons introduce HUD text, labels, or reframing. Slashes appear in system overlays. Parentheses are sparse and tonal. Dashes are rare in source dialogue but should not govern runtime prose. Repetition often replaces punctuation-driven flourish.
demonstrative_quotes:
The Garden Core is beautiful.
And wrong.
The reflection PEELS away from the window. Glass into air.

When she opens them, the rain has not stopped, the room is dark and the man beside her is still there.
Still here.

vocabulary_clusters: body-tech fusion: port, scar, tether, signal, neural pattern, residue, channel, integrity
material surfaces: chrome, glass, lens, wire, ribs, conduit, lattice, dust
light-state vocabulary: white light, amber light, warm white, morning light, static, glow
grief-state vocabulary: grief, hollow, unfinished, gone, still, numbness, mercy, loss
procedural/system language: compliance, reset, archive, override, root node, kill map, decode
tactile domestic anchors: mugs, flowers, chair, cot, hook, counter, rain, shoes
diction_fingerprint.register_and_formality: Austere, clinical, tactile, and compressed. Action lines mix industrial sci-fi terminology with bodily and domestic diction. Dialogue is sparse, controlled, and usually plainspoken, with occasional profanity used as pressure release rather than style default.
diction_fingerprint.word_frequency_patterns: High recurrence of chrome, glass, light, warm, still, wrong, hold, real, port, lens, signal, grief, same, clean, and not. Repetition clusters around stasis, bodily cost, mirrored doubles, and the distinction between real continuity and managed simulation.
distinctive_diction_quotes: A bed of wire and breath.
Lines of code that read as nerve.
The room cools by a degree she cannot measure but knows.
The warm white of real light passing through real glass.
The system defending its core with geometry.
Face doing what faces do without correction.

dialogue_fingerprint_per_character.speech_rhythm: Clipped, declarative, and guarded. Often one-line answers, refusals, or corrections. Emotional admissions arrive only after pressure and remain plain.
verbal_tics_or_recurring_phrases: direct boundary-setting with don't or not
vow-like full forms in key moments: I will
dialogue_fingerprint_per_character.emotional_range_in_dialogue: Compassionate triage, accusation, flat shock, moral clarity, refusal, quiet commitment.
distinguishing_markers: Rejects euphemism and institutional language.
Turns feeling into cost, purpose, or system critique.
Uses minimal syllables even on major stakes.
Speaks in principles or vows rather than comfort speeches.
dialogue_fingerprint_per_character.signature_line: I am done dying with him.

dialogue_fingerprint_per_character.speech_rhythm: Measured, spare, slightly more conversational than Nora, with dry tags and incomplete prompts that invite Nora to complete the emotional thought.
dialogue_fingerprint_per_character.emotional_range_in_dialogue: Bleak humor, caution, practical concern, guilt, restrained tenderness, fragile survival.
distinguishing_markers: Uses dry understatement to deflect dread.
Tracks risk in concrete, field-report terms.
Emotion surfaces through exact memory or blunt fact, not ornament.
Syntax gets smaller as vulnerability increases.

dialogue_fingerprint_per_character.speech_rhythm: Clinical, compressed, and mission-driven. Briefing cadence under pressure, then stripped confession when guilt breaks through.
dialogue_fingerprint_per_character.emotional_range_in_dialogue: Command authority, urgency, guilt, self-indictment, apology without softness, acceptance.
distinguishing_markers: Treats confession like a report until pressure strips it bare.
Frames risk as calculation and necessity.
Avoids cushioning language and rarely apologizes until the breaking point.
Technical vocabulary remains integrated even in moral confrontation.
dialogue_fingerprint_per_character.signature_line: Consent takes time. Time was gone.

dialogue_fingerprint_per_character.speech_rhythm: Measured, composed, and rhetorically complete. More fluid and formal than the others, with warmth used as argumentative force.
verbal_tics_or_recurring_phrases: The system still recognizes you as active.
dialogue_fingerprint_per_character.emotional_range_in_dialogue: Solicitous manipulation, ideological conviction, regret-shadowed authority, maternal grief, quiet menace.
distinguishing_markers: Frames coercion as care.
Uses abstract legitimizing nouns like continuity, permanence, mercy, love.
Maintains composure even when morally cornered.
Threat arrives through implication, not overt aggression.
dialogue_fingerprint_per_character.signature_line: That was not corruption. That was love refusing to stop.

dialogue_fingerprint_per_character.speech_rhythm: Soft, intimate, and persuasive. Calm certainty with second-person pressure and low-cost offers.
verbal_tics_or_recurring_phrases: We can give him back to you.
dialogue_fingerprint_per_character.emotional_range_in_dialogue: Seductive, patient, faintly mournful, coercive, quietly threatening.
distinguishing_markers: Offers rather than commands.
Weaponizes intimate domestic specifics.
Uses truth as leverage instead of obvious lies.
Appropriates the cadence of care to gain access.
dialogue_fingerprint_per_character.signature_line: We can give him back to you.

tension.technique: Machine-text intrusion turns bureaucracy into immediate pressure.
tension.rendering_method: HUD/system display embedded in scene structure

humor.quote: Great. Another set of coordinates from someone who might be dead.
humor.technique: Dry undercut delivered in one blunt line without tonal release.

grief.quote: He is still warm. Still gone.
grief.technique: Parallel clipped phrasing compresses contradiction into bodily fact.

wonder.quote:
The root node.
Not chrome. Not infrastructure. A living column of amber light rising from the chamber floor to the vaulted ceiling.
wonder.technique: Reveal through corrective fragments and material reclassification.

fear.quote:
The reflection moves before he does.
Subtle. Wrong.

violence.quote:
Ilya screams.
Not words. Not a name.
violence.technique: Negation strips speech down to primal sound rather than spectacle.

intimacy.quote:
JACE
If you forget.
NORA
I will remind you.
JACE
If you drift.
NORA
I will pull.

quotes: White light. Chrome ribs.
collocation_fingerprint.frequency: Early and memorable; signature opening image.

quotes: A bed of wire and breath.
Her HUD scrolls glyph-code beneath closed eyelids.
The chrome vein at her temple pulses once.
collocation_fingerprint.frequency: Occasional but distinctive bodily tech image.

quotes: The reflection PEELS away from the window. Glass into air.
He is still warm. Still gone.
Lands in a puddle of water and chrome dust.
Then a voice. Soft. Tender. Familiar. Wrong-familiar.
The tether Riven forged settling into signal.
Her HUD: NEURAL PORT INTEGRITY: 94%.
Her HUD: NEURAL PORT INTEGRITY: 3.6%.
The cracked lens sits on the decode plate. Real. Damaged.
The cracked one. The fracture line still splitting the glass.
The channel clear for the first time.
His heartbeat through the clean channel.
The residue pattern is the same.
The port cools. The warmth drains. Not all at once. In stages.
The clean port receives it perfectly.
A clean port the system cannot corrupt.
No static. No warmth bleeding through from dead channels.
The hubs. The kill map is coordinates.
Chrome tendrils extending from the walls.
Managed grief kept Ilya standing.
Still here.

JACE
Still here.
NORA
Still here.

negative_space_map.absence_evidence: Across all chapters the script avoids push in, close on, angle on, we see, pans, and shot choreography, relying instead on line breaks and image order.
negative_space_map.why_ai_defaults: AI screenplay imitation often leans on camera language to fake cinematic control instead of earning it through visual writing.

negative_space_map.absence_evidence: Tech and lore are conveyed through HUD text, object behavior, and terse conflict lines rather than long explanations of SoulSync, the Mirror, or system architecture.
negative_space_map.why_ai_defaults: AI tends to over-clarify speculative settings in dialogue because it fears reader confusion.

negative_space_map.absence_evidence: Humor is sparse, dry, and brief. Even Jace's lightest lines do not break the tonal severity.
negative_space_map.why_ai_defaults: AI often inserts banter to keep scenes lively, especially in sci-fi thrillers, but this script protects pressure through restraint.

negative_space_map.absence_evidence: Even the most poetic moments remain clipped and concrete, rarely expanding beyond short fragment clusters.
negative_space_map.why_ai_defaults: AI often mistakes emotional intensity for descriptive expansion and starts writing novelistic prose blocks.

negative_space_map.absence_evidence: Parentheticals stay sparse and functional: low, soft, flat, whisper, beat, through port, not looking up.
negative_space_map.why_ai_defaults: AI often over-directs performance when it cannot differentiate character voice cleanly on the page.

negative_space_map.absence_evidence: Characters do not explain their healing, trauma, or feelings in explicit modern self-help language; grief is shown through gesture, objects, and refusals.
negative_space_map.why_ai_defaults: AI commonly translates subtext into overt emotional naming to ensure readability.

negative_space_map.absence_evidence: Despite memory-heavy material, the script does not rely on montage headers or flashy sequence packaging.
negative_space_map.why_ai_defaults: AI often uses montage as a shortcut for compression when handling memory, travel, or setup.

show_explain_ratio.show_language_description: Primary mode is externalized showing through fragments, object handling, bodily lag, readouts, environmental detail, and repeated visual motifs. Emotion is usually visible as action, posture, touch, or system consequence.
show_explain_ratio.explain_language_description: Explanation appears only in short, pressure-bearing bursts: technical necessity, ideological reframing, or a rare direct thematic line after concrete buildup.
show_explain_ratio.enforcement_note: If a sentence cannot be filmed or inferred from behavior, object, readout, or spoken pressure, it likely exceeds this writer's explain threshold and should be cut or converted into action.

comparative_exclusion.overlapping_quality: Clinical speculative tension and body-tech unease.
differentiating_techniques: This writer is more fragment-driven and less discursive.
Emotional stakes are tethered to grief objects rather than philosophical dialogue alone.
Threat language is softer and more intimate, especially through the Mirror and Ilya.

comparative_exclusion.overlapping_quality: Procedural compression, cool surfaces, and emotionally withheld professionals.
differentiating_techniques: This script uses more negation-led fragments and less muscular sentence flow.
Technology is written as bodily and mournful rather than purely operational.
Domestic grief objects carry more thematic weight than Mann-style professional ritual.

comparative_exclusion.overlapping_quality: Sparse sci-fi seriousness, controlled dialogue, and visual dread.
differentiating_techniques: This writer relies more heavily on one-line fragment stacks and corrective beats.
System readouts are integrated as emotional language, not just world texture.
The script is less grandly metaphysical and more tactilely grief-specific.

action_line_metrics.average_words_per_line: Approximately 4-8 words per line overall, with occasional 10-14 word lines and rare 15-20 word technical lines.
action_line_metrics.fragment_percentage: Approximately 65-75% of action units are fragments or verbless clauses.
action_line_metrics.verb_first_percentage: Approximately 15-25%; present in beats like Runs, Holds, Moves, Catalogs, Falls, but noun-first fragments dominate.
action_line_metrics.all_caps_density: Low but strategic. Used for scene headings, first appearances, system text, interface labels, and occasional uncanny emphasis, not for constant prose intensity.
action_line_metrics.paragraph_rhythm: White-space driven. One-line image beats alternate with 2-4 line clusters. Scenes often end on an isolated verdict line or sensory correction. Denser blocks appear only for mission mechanics or ideological pressure.
demonstrative_quotes:
A POD.
White light. Chrome ribs. A bed of wire and breath. The dome is sealed. Frost on the glass.

The reflection moves before he does.
Subtle. Wrong.
It CHROMES over.
Concrete ceiling. Same ceiling. Different skull.

The city without its filter.
The SoulSync billboards are dark. Some have been stripped for parts. Some have been painted over. Murals in their place.
Crude. Human.

screenplay_structure_metrics.scene_density: High for a short script. Frequent scene changes and location pivots, with most scenes entering late and exiting on a hard image, readout, or decision beat.
screenplay_structure_metrics.int_ext_ratio: Interior-heavy, roughly 70/30 INT to EXT, with exteriors used for pursuit, aftermath, and post-system contrast.
screenplay_structure_metrics.action_to_dialogue_ratio: Action-forward, roughly 60/40 by page feel, with dialogue sparse and compressed even in confrontation scenes.
screenplay_structure_metrics.transition_types: Minimal and functional: FADE IN, CUT TO, SMASH CUT TO, CUT TO BLACK, TITLE CARD. Transitions are used sparingly rather than as stylistic flourish.
screenplay_structure_metrics.parenthetical_vocabulary: Sparse tonal markers only: soft, low, flat, whisper, beat, strained, through port, not looking up, private. No actor-coaching paragraphs.
screenplay_structure_metrics.character_introduction_patterns: Characters and entities are introduced in all caps with immediate visual or functional definition. Introductions favor one sharp image or role marker over backstory exposition.

representative_quotes: He is still warm. Still gone.
The port cools. The warmth drains.
Blood at her nose. Thin. Unwipped.
The reflection moves before he does.
Chrome tendrils extending from the walls.
The warm white of real light passing through real glass.
The hollow protects. Warmth cannot reach.
Not grief. Not relief. A room with the furniture removed.
The cleanest sound she has ever heard. The loneliest.
Ilya screams. Not words. Not a name.
Not explosion. Cessation. A heart stopping mid-beat.
Mercury sliding across the face. Features simplify. The mouth goes last.
A mercy killing she cannot perform herself.

screenplay_to_prose_protocol.prose_translation_rule: Do not reproduce sluglines verbatim in runtime prose. Translate each heading into an immediate location-state fragment that preserves the script's entry velocity, such as spatial condition, light, and material texture.
Preserve the clipped fragment architecture. Use short present-tense prose units, frequent sentence fragments, and white-space logic. Do not smooth into continuous literary paragraphs.
Keep reveal lines isolated as their own sentences or paragraph units. Important reversals should still land alone.
Do not mimic caps in prose except for diegetic interface text if shown on-screen. Translate emphasis through sentence isolation, order, and brevity.
Retain readouts as embedded diegetic text or concise labeled inserts. They should remain hard, clinical, and pressure-bearing, not paraphrased into explanatory narration.
Keep dialogue short, clean, and subtext-heavy. Preserve each character's compression level. Do not add connective chatter, emotional clarification, or banter.
Translate only essential tonal information into adjacent action or line delivery cues. Keep it minimal. If the parenthetical can be inferred from the line, omit it.
Do not write CUT TO or SMASH CUT TO in prose. Recreate the effect through abrupt paragraph breaks, hard image contrast, or immediate sensory relocation.
Introduce characters through one sharp visual or behavioral identifier plus role pressure. Avoid backstory front-loading.

Follow the screenplay's restraint. Translate inner state through body, object fixation, readout, and perception correction. Use direct thought only when the source already edges into close internal phrasing, and keep it compressed.
Use sparse, singular metaphors anchored to body, machinery, or domestic emptiness. Never expand into lyrical chains.
Enter scenes late, cut preamble, and end on a decision, image, or unresolved pressure point. The prose must feel edited, not narrated.

ip_specific_bans.ban: Do not add explanatory sci-fi dialogue that plainly defines SoulSync, the Mirror, grief loops, resets, or tether mechanics.
ip_specific_bans.evidence: The script withholds explanation and lets labels, readouts, and consequence carry meaning: "COMPLIANCE OVERDUE: 240 DAYS / FINAL NOTICE." "SoulSync is scaffolding."
ip_specific_bans.positive_replacement: Use terse system text, embodied consequence, and conflict-driven lines to imply rules.

ip_specific_bans.ban: Do not write emotionally explicit grief speeches for Nora or Jace.
ip_specific_bans.evidence: Loss is rendered externally: "He is still warm. Still gone." "Does not touch his face. Picks up his wrist. Sets it down."
ip_specific_bans.positive_replacement: Show grief through halted motion, repeated gestures, object handling, and refusal.

ip_specific_bans.ban: Do not smooth the fragment style into polished continuous prose.
ip_specific_bans.evidence: The script's core rhythm depends on clipped stacks: "Not fear. Recognition." "Concrete ceiling. Same ceiling. Different skull."
ip_specific_bans.positive_replacement: Keep short stacked fragments, isolated verdict lines, and corrective beats.

ip_specific_bans.ban: Do not use generic cyberpunk technobabble detached from body or emotion.
ip_specific_bans.evidence: Technical language is always grounded in sensation or cost: "NEURAL PORT INTEGRITY," "The warmth drains," "clean port," "residue pattern."
ip_specific_bans.positive_replacement: Tie every technical term to tactile detail, bodily risk, or relational stakes.

ip_specific_bans.ban: Do not make resistance characters glib, swaggering, or cool by default.
ip_specific_bans.evidence: Riven and Jace are burdened, terse, and morally scarred rather than triumphant or flashy.
ip_specific_bans.positive_replacement: Write competence as exhausted, compromised, and pressure-tested, with humor used rarely and dryly.

ip_specific_bans.ban: Do not insert flashy camera language or cinematic over-direction.
ip_specific_bans.evidence: The screenplay achieves visual control without "we see," shot sizes, or camera moves, relying on image order and white space instead.
ip_specific_bans.positive_replacement: Stage reveals through fragment sequencing, object focus, and isolated image lines.

ip_specific_bans.ban: Do not resolve grief beats with therapeutic uplift, healing jargon, or inspirational closure.
ip_specific_bans.evidence: The script rejects soft consolation: "No clean versions. No mercy rewrites." "Real or broken. It is mine."
ip_specific_bans.positive_replacement: Use hard-won acceptance, materially grounded choices, and practical vows.

ip_specific_bans.ban: Do not inflate climactic dialogue into melodramatic monologues.
ip_specific_bans.evidence: Major revelations arrive in compressed admissions: "I had a child." "I gave her to them." "It rained."
ip_specific_bans.positive_replacement: Favor short confessions, mirrored phrasing, and silence-framed statements.

ip_specific_bans.ban: Do not turn post-system aftermath into glossy exposition about the new world order.
ip_specific_bans.evidence: The ending shows change through environment: dark billboards, dead ports, murals, real flowers, rain, routine.
ip_specific_bans.positive_replacement: Convey aftermath through concrete human behavior and altered public surfaces.

fourteen_point_audit_protocol.pass_fail_definition: PASS only if the scene begins at a live pressure point, sensory discrepancy, or active decision. FAIL if it opens with setup explanation or calm orientation.
fourteen_point_audit_protocol.detection_method: Check the first 150-300 words for conflict, wrongness, pursuit, command pressure, or a loaded object/action.
fourteen_point_audit_protocol.repair_instruction: Cut all preamble. Start on the first wrong thing, urgent readout, refusal, or threat manifestation.

fourteen_point_audit_protocol.pass_fail_definition: PASS only if the prose preserves clipped fragment architecture and isolated beat lines. FAIL if most paragraphs read as smooth continuous exposition.
fourteen_point_audit_protocol.detection_method: Sample three paragraphs. Count fragment use, one-line beats, and corrective sentence stacks.
fourteen_point_audit_protocol.repair_instruction: Break long paragraphs. Convert summary into image fragments, short declaratives, and isolated verdict lines.

fourteen_point_audit_protocol.pass_fail_definition: PASS only if negation is used for exact reclassification, not generic drama. FAIL if corrective beats are absent or replaced by vague emphasis.
fourteen_point_audit_protocol.detection_method: Scan for not/no constructions and assess whether they sharpen perception into a more exact label.
fourteen_point_audit_protocol.repair_instruction: Replace vague adjectives with correction structures that deny the wrong reading and land on the right one.

fourteen_point_audit_protocol.pass_fail_definition: PASS only if technology is written through bodily consequence, tactile detail, or grief stakes. FAIL if tech exists as abstract jargon.
fourteen_point_audit_protocol.detection_method: Highlight every technical noun and verify it is paired with sensation, damage, warmth, signal, scar, or relational cost.
fourteen_point_audit_protocol.repair_instruction: Attach each system term to the body, an object, or a consequence the character can feel.

fourteen_point_audit_protocol.pass_fail_definition: PASS only if key emotional beats are tethered to recurring objects like lens, recorder, port, camera, flowers, or domestic items. FAIL if emotion floats free of material anchors.
fourteen_point_audit_protocol.detection_method: Track whether major emotional turns involve object handling, placement, or reclassification.
fourteen_point_audit_protocol.repair_instruction: Rebuild the beat around a touched, carried, worn, or observed object.

fourteen_point_audit_protocol.pass_fail_definition: PASS only if action prose averages roughly 4-8 words per line-equivalent with a high fragment rate and minimal syntactic drag. FAIL if action becomes long, explanatory, or novelistic.
fourteen_point_audit_protocol.detection_method: Measure a 200-word sample for average unit length, fragment percentage, and density of isolated beats.
fourteen_point_audit_protocol.repair_instruction: Cut modifiers, split clauses, remove interpretation, and restore short visual units.

fourteen_point_audit_protocol.pass_fail_definition: PASS only if most speeches remain brief, pressure-bearing, and character-specific. FAIL if characters explain themselves at length or sound equally articulate.
fourteen_point_audit_protocol.detection_method: Review each speaker's longest three lines and compare against established compression patterns.
fourteen_point_audit_protocol.repair_instruction: Shorten speeches, remove explanatory tails, and restore each character's rhythm: Nora blunt, Jace dry, Riven clinical, Ilya composed, Mirror coaxing.

fourteen_point_audit_protocol.pass_fail_definition: PASS only if HUD/system text increases pressure, diagnosis, or moral stakes. FAIL if readouts are decorative lore wallpaper.
fourteen_point_audit_protocol.detection_method: List all diegetic text inserts and ask whether each changes urgency, understanding, or consequence.
fourteen_point_audit_protocol.repair_instruction: Delete ornamental readouts. Keep only those that wound, warn, count down, or expose cost.

fourteen_point_audit_protocol.pass_fail_definition: PASS only if each major character is identifiable without tags. FAIL if lines could be swapped between speakers.
fourteen_point_audit_protocol.detection_method: Blind-read dialogue lines and test whether speaker identity remains obvious from rhythm, diction, and pressure style.
fourteen_point_audit_protocol.repair_instruction: Re-tune to character fingerprints: Nora cuts, Jace undercuts, Riven reports, Ilya reframes, Mirror offers.

fourteen_point_audit_protocol.pass_fail_definition: PASS only if world rules emerge through action, conflict, and environment. FAIL if characters lecture each other about the setting.
fourteen_point_audit_protocol.detection_method: Flag any line that exists primarily to inform the audience rather than pressure another character.
fourteen_point_audit_protocol.repair_instruction: Convert explanation into readout, consequence, interrupted procedure, or contested dialogue.

fourteen_point_audit_protocol.pass_fail_definition: PASS only if prose preserves screenplay velocity: late entry, visual sequencing, sparse interiority, and no slugline/camera imitation. FAIL if adaptation reads like translated summary.
fourteen_point_audit_protocol.detection_method: Check for forbidden carryovers like shot labels, and for missing carryovers like isolated reveal beats and hard cuts.
fourteen_point_audit_protocol.repair_instruction: Rebuild the passage as visual present-tense prose with scene-heading energy translated into location-state fragments.

fourteen_point_audit_protocol.pass_fail_definition: PASS only if emotion is mostly externalized through body, object, silence, and action. FAIL if the prose names feelings too often or too directly.
fourteen_point_audit_protocol.detection_method: Count abstract feeling labels and compare them to physical or behavioral indicators in the same passage.
fourteen_point_audit_protocol.repair_instruction: Replace named emotion with gesture, readout, touch, lag, breath pattern, or object fixation.

fourteen_point_audit_protocol.pass_fail_definition: PASS only if humor remains sparse, dry, and pressure-compatible. FAIL if banter, swagger, or tonal looseness undercuts dread and grief.
fourteen_point_audit_protocol.detection_method: Review all light lines and test whether they sharpen character or diffuse tension too much.
fourteen_point_audit_protocol.repair_instruction: Trim jokes to one dry line or remove them. Keep wit as abrasion, not relief.

fourteen_point_audit_protocol.pass_fail_definition: PASS only if the session or scene ends on a user-owned unresolved decision, vow, or moral pressure point rather than a passive cliffhanger.
fourteen_point_audit_protocol.detection_method: Inspect the final beat and ask whether the unresolved energy belongs to a choice the player must own.
fourteen_point_audit_protocol.repair_instruction: Reframe the ending around a held object, offered path, refused comfort, or next-step decision that remains open.
